display: 7 Days to Die Dedicated Server ARM64

password.desc: Set the join password for your server (leave blank for none).

port.desc: UDP/TCP base port the server will bind to (ServerPort).

save_name.desc: Name of the save game folder (GameName).

telnet_enabled.desc: Whether to enable the telnet remote admin interface (TelnetEnabled).

telnet_password.desc: Password required to connect to the telnet admin interface (TelnetPassword).

telnet_port.desc: TCP port for the telnet remote admin interface (TelnetPort).

world_name.desc: World/map to generate or load (GameWorld). Use Navezgane or RWG for a random world.

world_seed.desc: Seed used for random world generation (WorldGenSeed). Only applies on first generation.

world_size.desc: Size of the generated world in tiles (WorldGenSize). Only applies on first generation.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/7dtd && until [ -f /tmp/7dtd/7DaysToDieServer.x86_64 ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +login anonymous +app_info_print 294420 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +login anonymous +app_info_print 294420 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +force_install_dir /tmp/7dtd +login anonymous +app_update 294420 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/7dtd/7DaysToDieServer.x86_64 ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/7dtd/. . && rm -rf /tmp/7dtd'

run.command:
sh -c 'id -u sdtd >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m sdtd || adduser -D sdtd; mkdir -p /home/sdtd/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/sdtd/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/sdtd/.steam/sdk64/; fi; chown -R sdtd:sdtd . /home/sdtd/.steam; cat > serverconfig.xml << EOF
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<ServerSettings>
  <property name="ServerName" value="${name}"/>
  <property name="ServerPassword" value="${password}"/>
  <property name="ServerPort" value="${port}"/>
  <property name="ServerMaxPlayerCount" value="${players}"/>
  <property name="GameWorld" value="${world_name}"/>
  <property name="GameName" value="${save_name}"/>
  <property name="WorldGenSeed" value="${world_seed}"/>
  <property name="WorldGenSize" value="${world_size}"/>
  <property name="GameDifficulty" value="${game_difficulty}"/>
  <property name="GameMode" value="${game_mode}"/>
  <property name="TelnetEnabled" value="${telnet_enabled}"/>
  <property name="TelnetPort" value="${telnet_port}"/>
  <property name="TelnetPassword" value="${telnet_password}"/>
</ServerSettings>
EOF
chown sdtd:sdtd serverconfig.xml; exec runuser -u sdtd -- box64 ./7DaysToDieServer.x86_64 -logfile output.log -quit -batchmode -nographics -configfile=serverconfig.xml -dedicated'

name: 7daystodie-arm64
